_comment: Auto-blog ledger. The Worker reads this before generating to avoid repeating topics, angles, hooks, and examples. Each entry is appended automatically after publishing.

posts.topic: when native apps are the wrong answer for most businesses
posts.angle: contrarian — most 'we need an app' requests should be websites or PWAs; three-question filter
hooks: four out of five I talk out of it

posts.topic: websites as owned assets vs rented platforms
posts.angle: ownership/equity framing — comparing platforms to renting and websites to owning real estate
hooks: platforms come and go but websites last

posts.topic: what actually grows social audiences past a million
posts.angle: system over tactics — boring consistency beats viral luck
examples: clients with viral posts that didn't convert

posts.topic: SEO landscape in 2026 with AI overviews and zero-click search
posts.angle: what changed vs what stayed the same — basics still rule

posts.topic: what separates winning vs losing paid ad campaigns
posts.angle: offer + funnel + signal — three pillar diagnostic framework

posts.topic: brand is the gap between promise and delivery, not visual identity
posts.angle: anti-rebrand — brand is operational, not aesthetic; logos don't fix business problems
hooks: operations project with a design output

posts.topic: when custom software costs more than it saves; off-the-shelf vs custom
posts.angle: honeymoon vs marriage — three-step filter; starting with a scalpel not a platform
hooks: custom software as permanent employee who never leaves

posts.topic: why ad platform dashboards over-report and how to actually measure marketing
posts.angle: three trustworthy numbers + incrementality testing + three-layer measurement stack
